items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding hiding slots within 48 hours.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that states, 'Never hide slots within 48 hours (still fill urgent needs)'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm whether this requirement is satisfied. The prior step evidence does not demonstrate the functionality of the hiding algorithm or its adherence to the specified conditions, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
